108: @api_chat.get("/stats", response_class=Response)
109: @requires(["authenticated"])
110: def chat_stats(request: Request, common: CommonQueryParams) -> Response:
111:     num_conversations = ConversationAdapters.get_num_conversations(request.user.object)
112:     return Response(
113:         content=json.dumps({"num_conversations": num_conversations}), media_type="application/json", status_code=200
114:     )

124: @api_chat.get("/conversation/file-filters/{conversation_id}", response_class=Response)
125: @requires(["authenticated"])
126: def get_file_filter(request: Request, conversation_id: str) -> Response:
127:     conversation = ConversationAdapters.get_conversation_by_user(request.user.object, conversation_id=conversation_id)
128:     if not conversation:
129:         return Response(content=json.dumps({"status": "error", "message": "Conversation not found"}), status_code=404)
130: 
131:     # get all files from "computer"
132:     file_list = EntryAdapters.get_all_filenames_by_source(request.user.object, "computer")
133:     file_filters = []
134:     for file in conversation.file_filters:
135:         if file in file_list:
136:             file_filters.append(file)
137:     return Response(content=json.dumps(file_filters), media_type="application/json", status_code=200)
138:

144:     files_filter = filter.filenames

146:     return Response(content=json.dumps(file_filters), media_type="application/json", status_code=200)

191: @api_chat.post("/speech")
192: @requires(["authenticated"])
193: async def text_to_speech(
194:     request: Request,
195:     common: CommonQueryParams,
196:     text: str,
197:     rate_limiter_per_minute=Depends(
198:         ApiUserRateLimiter(requests=30, subscribed_requests=30, window=60, slug="chat_minute")
199:     ),
200:     rate_limiter_per_day=Depends(
201:         ApiUserRateLimiter(requests=100, subscribed_requests=600, window=60 * 60 * 24, slug="chat_day")
202:     ),
203: ) -> Response:
204:     voice_model = await ConversationAdapters.aget_voice_model_config(request.user.object)
205: 
206:     params = {"text_to_speak": text}
207: 
208:     if voice_model:
209:         params["voice_id"] = voice_model.model_id
210: 
211:     try:
212:         speech_stream = generate_text_to_speech(**params)
213:     except TextToSpeechError as e:
214:         raise HTTPException(status_code=503, detail=str(e))
215:     return StreamingResponse(speech_stream.iter_content(chunk_size=1024), media_type="audio/mpeg")
216:

229: @api_chat.get("/history")
230: @requires(["authenticated"])
231: def chat_history(
232:     request: Request,
233:     common: CommonQueryParams,
234:     conversation_id: Optional[str] = None,
235:     n: Optional[int] = None,
236: ):
237:     user = request.user.object
238:     validate_chat_model(user)
239: 
240:     # Load Conversation History
241:     conversation = ConversationAdapters.get_conversation_by_user(
242:         user=user, client_application=request.user.client_app, conversation_id=conversation_id
243:     )
244: 
245:     if conversation is None:
246:         return Response(
247:             content=json.dumps({"status": "error", "message": f"Conversation: {conversation_id} not found"}),
248:             status_code=404,
249:         )
250: 
251:     agent_metadata = None
252:     if conversation.agent:
253:         if conversation.agent.privacy_level == Agent.PrivacyLevel.PRIVATE and conversation.agent.creator != user:
254:             conversation.agent = None
255:         else:
256:             agent_metadata = {
257:                 "slug": conversation.agent.slug,
258:                 "name": conversation.agent.name,
259:                 "is_creator": conversation.agent.creator == user,
260:                 "color": conversation.agent.style_color,
261:                 "icon": conversation.agent.style_icon,
262:                 "persona": conversation.agent.personality,
263:                 "is_hidden": conversation.agent.is_hidden,
264:             }
265: 
266:     meta_log = conversation.conversation_log
267:     meta_log.update(
268:         {
269:             "conversation_id": conversation.id,
270:             "slug": conversation.title if conversation.title else conversation.slug,
271:             "agent": agent_metadata,
272:             "is_owner": conversation.user == user,
273:         }
274:     )
275: 
276:     if n:
277:         # Get latest N messages if N > 0
278:         if n > 0 and meta_log.get("chat"):
279:             meta_log["chat"] = meta_log["chat"][-n:]
280:         # Else return all messages except latest N
281:         elif n < 0 and meta_log.get("chat"):
282:             meta_log["chat"] = meta_log["chat"][:n]
283: 
284:     update_telemetry_state(
285:         request=request,
286:         telemetry_type="api",
287:         api="chat_history",
288:         **common.__dict__,
289:     )
290: 
291:     return {"status": "ok", "response": meta_log}
292: 
293: 
294: @api_chat.get("/share/history")
295: def get_shared_chat(
296:     request: Request,
297:     common: CommonQueryParams,
298:     public_conversation_slug: str,
299:     n: Optional[int] = None,
300: ):
301:     user = request.user.object if request.user.is_authenticated else None
302: 
303:     # Load Conversation History
304:     conversation = PublicConversationAdapters.get_public_conversation_by_slug(public_conversation_slug)
305: 
306:     if conversation is None:
307:         return Response(
308:             content=json.dumps({"status": "error", "message": f"Conversation: {public_conversation_slug} not found"}),
309:             status_code=404,
310:         )
311: 
312:     agent_metadata = None
313:     if conversation.agent:
314:         if conversation.agent.privacy_level == Agent.PrivacyLevel.PRIVATE and conversation.agent.creator != user:
315:             if conversation.agent.is_hidden:
316:                 default_agent = AgentAdapters.get_default_agent()
317:                 agent_metadata = {
318:                     "slug": default_agent.slug,
319:                     "name": default_agent.name,
320:                     "is_creator": False,
321:                     "color": default_agent.style_color,
322:                     "icon": default_agent.style_icon,
323:                     "persona": default_agent.personality,
324:                     "is_hidden": default_agent.is_hidden,
325:                 }
326:             else:
327:                 conversation.agent = None
328:         else:
329:             agent_metadata = {
330:                 "slug": conversation.agent.slug,
331:                 "name": conversation.agent.name,
332:                 "is_creator": conversation.agent.creator == user,
333:                 "color": conversation.agent.style_color,
334:                 "icon": conversation.agent.style_icon,
335:                 "persona": conversation.agent.personality,
336:                 "is_hidden": conversation.agent.is_hidden,
337:             }
338: 
339:     meta_log = conversation.conversation_log
340:     scrubbed_title = conversation.title if conversation.title else conversation.slug
341: 
342:     if scrubbed_title:
343:         scrubbed_title = scrubbed_title.replace("-", " ")
344: 
345:     meta_log.update(
346:         {
347:             "conversation_id": conversation.id,
348:             "slug": scrubbed_title,
349:             "agent": agent_metadata,
350:             "is_owner": conversation.source_owner == user,
351:         }
352:     )
353: 
354:     if n:
355:         # Get latest N messages if N > 0
356:         if n > 0 and meta_log.get("chat"):
357:             meta_log["chat"] = meta_log["chat"][-n:]
358:         # Else return all messages except latest N
359:         elif n < 0 and meta_log.get("chat"):
360:             meta_log["chat"] = meta_log["chat"][:n]
361: 
362:     update_telemetry_state(
363:         request=request,
364:         telemetry_type="api",
365:         api="get_shared_chat_history",
366:         **common.__dict__,
367:     )
368: 
369:     return {"status": "ok", "response": meta_log}
370:

394: @api_chat.post("/share/fork")
395: @requires(["authenticated"])
396: def fork_public_conversation(
397:     request: Request,
398:     common: CommonQueryParams,
399:     public_conversation_slug: str,
400: ):
401:     user = request.user.object
402: 
403:     # Load Conversation History
404:     public_conversation = PublicConversationAdapters.get_public_conversation_by_slug(public_conversation_slug)
405: 
406:     # Duplicate Public Conversation to User's Private Conversation
407:     new_conversation = ConversationAdapters.create_conversation_from_public_conversation(
408:         user, public_conversation, request.user.client_app
409:     )
410: 
411:     chat_metadata = {"forked_conversation": public_conversation.slug}
412: 
413:     update_telemetry_state(
414:         request=request,
415:         telemetry_type="api",
416:         api="fork_public_conversation",
417:         **common.__dict__,
418:         metadata=chat_metadata,
419:     )
420: 
421:     redirect_uri = str(request.app.url_path_for("chat_page"))
422: 
423:     return Response(
424:         status_code=200,
425:         content=json.dumps(
426:             {
427:                 "status": "ok",
428:                 "next_url": redirect_uri,
429:                 "conversation_id": str(new_conversation.id),
430:             }
431:         ),
432:     )

435: @api_chat.post("/share")
436: @requires(["authenticated"])
437: def duplicate_chat_history_public_conversation(
438:     request: Request,
439:     common: CommonQueryParams,
440:     conversation_id: str,
441: ):
442:     user = request.user.object
443:     domain = request.headers.get("host")
444:     scheme = request.url.scheme
445:     # Force https upgrade if not explicitly disabled and not local host
446:     if scheme == "http" and not is_env_var_true("KHOJ_NO_HTTPS") and not is_local_api(f"{request.base_url}"):
447:         scheme = "https"
448: 
449:     # Throw unauthorized exception if domain not in ALLOWED_HOSTS
450:     host_domain = domain.split(":")[0]
451:     if host_domain not in ALLOWED_HOSTS:
452:         raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Unauthorized domain")
453: 
454:     # Duplicate Conversation History to Public Conversation
455:     conversation = ConversationAdapters.get_conversation_by_user(user, request.user.client_app, conversation_id)
456:     public_conversation = ConversationAdapters.make_public_conversation_copy(conversation)
457:     public_conversation_url = PublicConversationAdapters.get_public_conversation_url(public_conversation)
458: 
459:     update_telemetry_state(
460:         request=request,
461:         telemetry_type="api",
462:         api="post_chat_share",
463:         **common.__dict__,
464:     )
465: 
466:     return Response(
467:         status_code=200, content=json.dumps({"status": "ok", "url": f"{scheme}://{domain}{public_conversation_url}"})
468:     )
469:

498: @api_chat.get("/sessions")
499: @requires(["authenticated"])
500: def chat_sessions(
501:     request: Request,
502:     common: CommonQueryParams,
503:     recent: Optional[bool] = False,
504: ):
505:     user = request.user.object
506: 
507:     # Load Conversation Sessions
508:     conversations = ConversationAdapters.get_conversation_sessions(user, request.user.client_app)
509:     if recent:
510:         conversations = conversations[:8]
511: 
512:     sessions = conversations.values_list(
513:         "id",
514:         "slug",
515:         "title",
516:         "agent__slug",
517:         "agent__name",
518:         "created_at",
519:         "updated_at",
520:         "agent__style_icon",
521:         "agent__style_color",
522:         "agent__is_hidden",
523:     )
524: 
525:     session_values = [
526:         {
527:             "conversation_id": str(session[0]),
528:             "slug": session[2] or session[1],
529:             "agent_name": session[4],
530:             "created": session[5].strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
531:             "updated": session[6].strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
532:             "agent_icon": session[7],
533:             "agent_color": session[8],
534:             "agent_is_hidden": session[9],
535:         }
536:         for session in sessions
537:     ]
538: 
539:     update_telemetry_state(
540:         request=request,
541:         telemetry_type="api",
542:         api="chat_sessions",
543:         **common.__dict__,
544:     )
545: 
546:     return Response(content=json.dumps(session_values), media_type="application/json", status_code=200)
547:

579: @api_chat.get("/options", response_class=Response)
580: async def chat_options(
581:     request: Request,
582:     common: CommonQueryParams,
583: ) -> Response:
584:     cmd_options = {}
585:     for cmd in ConversationCommand:
586:         if cmd == ConversationCommand.Operator and not is_operator_enabled():
587:             continue
588:         if cmd in command_descriptions:
589:             cmd_options[cmd.value] = command_descriptions[cmd]
590: 
591:     update_telemetry_state(
592:         request=request,
593:         telemetry_type="api",
594:         api="chat_options",
595:         **common.__dict__,
596:     )
597:     return Response(content=json.dumps(cmd_options), media_type="application/json", status_code=200)
598: 
599: 
600: @api_chat.patch("/title", response_class=Response)
601: @requires(["authenticated"])
602: async def set_conversation_title(
603:     request: Request,
604:     common: CommonQueryParams,
605:     title: str,
606:     conversation_id: Optional[str] = None,
607: ) -> Response:
608:     user = request.user.object
609:     title = title.strip()[:200]
610: 
611:     # Set Conversation Title
612:     conversation = await ConversationAdapters.aset_conversation_title(
613:         user, request.user.client_app, conversation_id, title
614:     )
615: 
616:     success = True if conversation else False
617: 
618:     update_telemetry_state(
619:         request=request,
620:         telemetry_type="api",
621:         api="set_conversation_title",
622:         **common.__dict__,
623:     )
624: 
625:     return Response(
626:         content=json.dumps({"status": "ok", "success": success}), media_type="application/json", status_code=200
627:     )
628: 
629: 
630: @api_chat.post("/title")
631: @requires(["authenticated"])
632: async def generate_chat_title(
633:     request: Request,
634:     common: CommonQueryParams,
635:     conversation_id: str,
636: ):
637:     user: KhojUser = request.user.object
638:     conversation = await ConversationAdapters.aget_conversation_by_user(user=user, conversation_id=conversation_id)
639: 
640:     # Conversation.title is explicitly set by the user. Do not override.
641:     if conversation.title:
642:         return {"status": "ok", "title": conversation.title}
643: 
644:     if not conversation:
645:         raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Conversation not found")
646: 
647:     new_title = await acreate_title_from_history(request.user.object, conversation=conversation)
648:     conversation.slug = clean_text_for_db(new_title[:200])
649: 
650:     await conversation.asave()
651: 
652:     return {"status": "ok", "title": new_title}
653: 
654: 
655: @api_chat.delete("/conversation/message", response_class=Response)
656: @requires(["authenticated"])
657: def delete_message(request: Request, delete_request: DeleteMessageRequestBody) -> Response:
658:     user = request.user.object
659:     success = ConversationAdapters.delete_message_by_turn_id(
660:         user, delete_request.conversation_id, delete_request.turn_id
661:     )
662:     if success:
663:         return Response(content=json.dumps({"status": "ok"}), media_type="application/json", status_code=200)
664:     else:
665:         return Response(content=json.dumps({"status": "error", "message": "Message not found"}), status_code=404)
666: 
667: 
668: async def event_generator(
669:     body: ChatRequestBody,
670:     user_scope: Any,
671:     common: CommonQueryParams,
672:     headers: Headers,
673:     request_obj: Request | WebSocket,
674:     parent_interrupt_queue: asyncio.Queue = None,
675: ):
676:     # Access the parameters from the body
677:     q = body.q
678:     n = body.n
679:     d = body.d
680:     stream = body.stream
681:     title = body.title
682:     conversation_id = body.conversation_id
683:     turn_id = str(body.turn_id or uuid.uuid4())
684:     city = body.city
685:     region = body.region
686:     country = body.country or get_country_name_from_timezone(body.timezone)
687:     country_code = body.country_code or get_country_code_from_timezone(body.timezone)
688:     raw_images = body.images
689:     raw_query_files = body.files
690: 
691:     start_time = time.perf_counter()
692:     ttft = None
693:     chat_metadata: dict = {}
694:     conversation = None
695:     user: KhojUser = user_scope.object
696:     is_subscribed = has_required_scope(request_obj, ["premium"])
697:     q = unquote(q)
698:     defiltered_query = defilter_query(q)
699:     train_of_thought = []
700:     cancellation_event = asyncio.Event()
701:     child_interrupt_queue: asyncio.Queue = asyncio.Queue(maxsize=10)
702: 
703:     tracer: dict = {
704:         "mid": turn_id,
705:         "cid": conversation_id,
706:         "uid": user.id,
707:         "khoj_version": state.khoj_version,
708:     }
709: 
710:     uploaded_images: list[str] = []
711:     if raw_images:
712:         for image in raw_images:
713:             decoded_string = unquote(image)
714:             base64_data = decoded_string.split(",", 1)[1]
715:             image_bytes = base64.b64decode(base64_data)
716:             webp_image_bytes = convert_image_to_webp(image_bytes)
717:             uploaded_image = upload_user_image_to_bucket(webp_image_bytes, user.id)
718:             if not uploaded_image:
719:                 base64_webp_image = base64.b64encode(webp_image_bytes).decode("utf-8")
720:                 uploaded_image = f"data:image/webp;base64,{base64_webp_image}"
721:             uploaded_images.append(uploaded_image)
722: 
723:     query_files: Dict[str, str] = {}
724:     if raw_query_files:
725:         for file in raw_query_files:
726:             query_files[file.name] = file.content
727: 
728:     research_results: List[ResearchIteration] = []
729:     online_results: Dict = dict()
730:     code_results: Dict = dict()
731:     operator_results: List[OperatorRun] = []
732:     compiled_references: List[Any] = []
733:     inferred_queries: List[Any] = []
734:     attached_file_context = gather_raw_query_files(query_files)
735: 
736:     generated_images: List[str] = []
737:     generated_mermaidjs_diagram: str = None
738:     generated_asset_results: Dict = dict()
739:     program_execution_context: List[str] = []
740:     user_message_time = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
741: 
742:     # Create a task to monitor for disconnections
743:     disconnect_monitor_task = None
744: 
745:     async def monitor_disconnection():
746:         nonlocal q, defiltered_query
747:         if isinstance(request_obj, Request):
748:             try:
749:                 msg = await request_obj.receive()
750:                 if msg["type"] == "http.disconnect":
751:                     logger.debug(f"Request cancelled. User {user} disconnected from {common.client} client.")
752:                     cancellation_event.set()
753:                     # ensure partial chat state saved on interrupt
754:                     # shield the save against task cancellation
755:                     if conversation:
756:                         await asyncio.shield(
757:                             save_to_conversation_log(
758:                                 q,
759:                                 chat_response="",
760:                                 user=user,
761:                                 compiled_references=compiled_references,
762:                                 online_results=online_results,
763:                                 code_results=code_results,
764:                                 operator_results=operator_results,
765:                                 research_results=research_results,
766:                                 inferred_queries=inferred_queries,
767:                                 client_application=user_scope.client_app,
768:                                 conversation_id=conversation_id,
769:                                 query_images=uploaded_images,
770:                                 train_of_thought=train_of_thought,
771:                                 raw_query_files=raw_query_files,
772:                                 generated_images=generated_images,
773:                                 generated_mermaidjs_diagram=generated_mermaidjs_diagram,
774:                                 user_message_time=user_message_time,
775:                                 tracer=tracer,
776:                             )
777:                         )
778:             except Exception as e:
779:                 logger.error(f"Error in disconnect monitor: {e}")
780:         elif isinstance(request_obj, WebSocket):
781:             while request_obj.client_state == WebSocketState.CONNECTED and not cancellation_event.is_set():
782:                 await asyncio.sleep(1)
783: 
784:                 # Check if any interrupt query is received
785:                 if interrupt_query := get_message_from_queue(parent_interrupt_queue):
786:                     if interrupt_query == ChatEvent.END_EVENT.value:
787:                         cancellation_event.set()
788:                         logger.debug(f"Chat cancelled by user {user} via interrupt queue.")
789:                     elif interrupt_query == ChatEvent.INTERRUPT.value:
790:                         cancellation_event.set()
791:                         logger.debug("Chat interrupted.")
792:                     else:
793:                         # Pass the interrupt query to child tasks
794:                         logger.info(f"Continuing chat with the new instruction: {interrupt_query}")
795:                         await child_interrupt_queue.put(interrupt_query)
796:                         # Append the interrupt query to the main query
797:                         q += f"\n\n{interrupt_query}"
798:                         defiltered_query += f"\n\n{defilter_query(interrupt_query)}"
799: 
800:             logger.debug(f"WebSocket disconnected or chat cancelled by user {user} from {common.client} client.")
801:             if conversation and cancellation_event.is_set():
802:                 await asyncio.shield(
803:                     save_to_conversation_log(
804:                         q,
805:                         chat_response="",
806:                         user=user,
807:                         compiled_references=compiled_references,
808:                         online_results=online_results,
809:                         code_results=code_results,
810:                         operator_results=operator_results,
811:                         research_results=research_results,
812:                         inferred_queries=inferred_queries,
813:                         client_application=user_scope.client_app,
814:                         conversation_id=conversation_id,
815:                         query_images=uploaded_images,
816:                         train_of_thought=train_of_thought,
817:                         raw_query_files=raw_query_files,
818:                         generated_images=generated_images,
819:                         generated_mermaidjs_diagram=generated_mermaidjs_diagram,
820:                         user_message_time=user_message_time,
821:                         tracer=tracer,
822:                     )
823:                 )
824: 
825:     # Cancel the disconnect monitor task if it is still running
826:     async def cancel_disconnect_monitor():
827:         if disconnect_monitor_task and not disconnect_monitor_task.done():
828:             logger.debug(f"Cancelling disconnect monitor task for user {user}")
829:             disconnect_monitor_task.cancel()
830:             try:
831:                 await disconnect_monitor_task
832:             except asyncio.CancelledError:
833:                 pass
834: 
835:     async def send_event(event_type: ChatEvent, data: str | dict):
836:         nonlocal ttft, train_of_thought
837:         if cancellation_event.is_set():
838:             return
839:         try:
840:             if event_type == ChatEvent.END_LLM_RESPONSE:
841:                 collect_telemetry()
842:             elif event_type == ChatEvent.START_LLM_RESPONSE:
843:                 ttft = time.perf_counter() - start_time
844:             elif event_type == ChatEvent.STATUS:
845:                 train_of_thought.append({"type": event_type.value, "data": data})
846:             elif event_type == ChatEvent.THOUGHT:
847:                 # Append the data to the last thought as thoughts are streamed
848:                 if (
849:                     len(train_of_thought) > 0
850:                     and train_of_thought[-1]["type"] == ChatEvent.THOUGHT.value
851:                     and isinstance(train_of_thought[-1]["data"], str)
852:                     and isinstance(data, str)
853:                 ):
854:                     train_of_thought[-1]["data"] += data
855:                 else:
856:                     train_of_thought.append({"type": event_type.value, "data": data})
857: 
858:             if event_type == ChatEvent.MESSAGE:
859:                 yield data
860:             elif event_type == ChatEvent.REFERENCES or ChatEvent.METADATA or stream:
861:                 yield json.dumps({"type": event_type.value, "data": data}, ensure_ascii=False)
862:         except Exception as e:
863:             if not cancellation_event.is_set():
864:                 logger.error(
865:                     f"Failed to stream chat API response to {user} on {common.client}: {e}.",
866:                     exc_info=True,
867:                 )
868:         finally:
869:             if not cancellation_event.is_set():
870:                 yield ChatEvent.END_EVENT.value
871:             # Cancel the disconnect monitor task if it is still running
872:             if cancellation_event.is_set() or event_type == ChatEvent.END_RESPONSE:
873:                 await cancel_disconnect_monitor()
874: 
875:     async def send_llm_response(response: str, usage: dict = None):
876:         # Check if the client is still connected
877:         if cancellation_event.is_set():
878:             return
879:         # Send Chat Response
880:         async for result in send_event(ChatEvent.START_LLM_RESPONSE, ""):
881:             yield result
882:         async for result in send_event(ChatEvent.MESSAGE, response):
883:             yield result
884:         async for result in send_event(ChatEvent.END_LLM_RESPONSE, ""):
885:             yield result
886:         # Send Usage Metadata once llm interactions are complete
887:         if usage:
888:             async for event in send_event(ChatEvent.USAGE, usage):
889:                 yield event
890:         async for result in send_event(ChatEvent.END_RESPONSE, ""):
891:             yield result
892: 
893:     def collect_telemetry():
894:         # Gather chat response telemetry
895:         nonlocal chat_metadata
896:         latency = time.perf_counter() - start_time
897:         cmd_set = set([cmd.value for cmd in conversation_commands])
898:         cost = (tracer.get("usage", {}) or {}).get("cost", 0)
899:         chat_metadata = chat_metadata or {}
900:         chat_metadata["conversation_command"] = cmd_set
901:         chat_metadata["agent"] = conversation.agent.slug if conversation and conversation.agent else None
902:         chat_metadata["cost"] = f"{cost:.5f}"
903:         chat_metadata["latency"] = f"{latency:.3f}"
904:         if ttft:
905:             chat_metadata["ttft_latency"] = f"{ttft:.3f}"
906:             logger.info(f"Chat response time to first token: {ttft:.3f} seconds")
907:         logger.info(f"Chat response total time: {latency:.3f} seconds")
908:         logger.info(f"Chat response cost: ${cost:.5f}")
909:         update_telemetry_state(
910:             request=request_obj,
911:             telemetry_type="api",
912:             api="chat",
913:             client=common.client,
914:             user_agent=headers.get("user-agent"),
915:             host=headers.get("host"),
916:             metadata=chat_metadata,
917:         )
918: 
919:     # Start the disconnect monitor in the background
920:     disconnect_monitor_task = asyncio.create_task(monitor_disconnection())
921: 
922:     if is_query_empty(q):
923:         async for result in send_llm_response("Please ask your query to get started.", tracer.get("usage")):
924:             yield result
925:         return
926: 
927:     # Automated tasks are handled before to allow mixing them with other conversation commands
928:     cmds_to_rate_limit = []
929:     if q.startswith("/automated_task"):
930:         q = q.replace("/automated_task", "").lstrip()
931:         cmds_to_rate_limit += [ConversationCommand.AutomatedTask]
932: 
933:     # Extract conversation command from query
934:     conversation_commands = [get_conversation_command(query=q)]
935: 
936:     conversation = await ConversationAdapters.aget_conversation_by_user(
937:         user,
938:         client_application=user_scope.client_app,
939:         conversation_id=conversation_id,
940:         title=title,
941:         create_new=body.create_new,
942:     )
943:     if not conversation:
944:         async for result in send_llm_response(f"Conversation {conversation_id} not found", tracer.get("usage")):
945:             yield result
946:         return
947:     conversation_id = str(conversation.id)
948: 
949:     async for event in send_event(ChatEvent.METADATA, {"conversationId": conversation_id, "turnId": turn_id}):
950:         yield event
951: 
952:     agent: Agent | None = None
953:     default_agent = await AgentAdapters.aget_default_agent()
954:     if conversation.agent and conversation.agent != default_agent:
955:         agent = conversation.agent
956: 
957:     if not conversation.agent:
958:         conversation.agent = default_agent
959:         await conversation.asave()
960:         agent = default_agent
961: 
962:     await is_ready_to_chat(user)
963:     user_name = await aget_user_name(user)
964:     location = None
965:     if city or region or country or country_code:
966:         location = LocationData(city=city, region=region, country=country, country_code=country_code)
967:     chat_history = conversation.messages
968: 
969:     # Get most recent memories and long term relevant memories if memory is enabled
970:     relevant_memories = []
971:     if await ConversationAdapters.ais_memory_enabled(user):
972:         recent_memories = await UserMemoryAdapters.pull_memories(user=user, agent=agent)
973:         long_term_memories = await UserMemoryAdapters.search_memories(query=q, user=user, agent=agent)
974:         # Create a de-duped set of memories
975:         relevant_memories = list({m.id: m for m in recent_memories + long_term_memories}.values())
976: 
977:     # If interrupted message in DB
978:     if last_message := await conversation.pop_message(interrupted=True):
979:         # Populate context from interrupted message
980:         online_results = {key: val.model_dump() for key, val in last_message.onlineContext.items() or []}
981:         code_results = {key: val.model_dump() for key, val in last_message.codeContext.items() or []}
982:         compiled_references = [ref.model_dump() for ref in last_message.context or []]
983:         research_results = [
984:             ResearchIteration(**iter_dict)
985:             for iter_dict in last_message.researchContext or []
986:             if iter_dict.get("summarizedResult")
987:         ]
988:         operator_results = [OperatorRun(**iter_dict) for iter_dict in last_message.operatorContext or []]
989:         train_of_thought = [thought.model_dump() for thought in last_message.trainOfThought or []]
990:         logger.info(f"Loaded interrupted partial context from conversation {conversation_id}.")
991: 
992:     if conversation_commands == [ConversationCommand.Default]:
993:         try:
994:             chosen_io = await aget_data_sources_and_output_format(
995:                 q,
996:                 chat_history,
997:                 user=user,
998:                 query_images=uploaded_images,
999:                 agent=agent,
1000:                 query_files=attached_file_context,
1001:                 relevant_memories=relevant_memories,
1002:                 tracer=tracer,
1003:             )
1004:         except ValueError as e:
1005:             logger.error(f"Error getting data sources and output format: {e}. Falling back to default.")
1006:             chosen_io = {"sources": [ConversationCommand.General], "output": ConversationCommand.Text}
1007: 
1008:         conversation_commands = chosen_io.get("sources") + [chosen_io.get("output")]
1009: 
1010:         # If we're doing research, we don't want to do anything else
1011:         if ConversationCommand.Research in conversation_commands:
1012:             conversation_commands = [ConversationCommand.Research]
1013: 
1014:         conversation_commands_str = ", ".join([cmd.value for cmd in conversation_commands])
1015:         async for result in send_event(ChatEvent.STATUS, f"**Selected Tools:** {conversation_commands_str}"):
1016:             yield result
1017: 
1018:     cmds_to_rate_limit += conversation_commands
1019:     for cmd in cmds_to_rate_limit:
1020:         try:
1021:             await conversation_command_rate_limiter.update_and_check_if_valid(request_obj, cmd)
1022:             q = q.replace(f"/{cmd.value}", "").strip()
1023:         except HTTPException as e:
1024:             async for result in send_llm_response(str(e.detail), tracer.get("usage")):
1025:                 yield result
1026:             return
1027: 
1028:     defiltered_query = defilter_query(q)
1029: 
1030:     if conversation_commands == [ConversationCommand.Research]:
1031:         async for research_result in research(
1032:             user=user,
1033:             query=defiltered_query,
1034:             conversation_id=conversation_id,
1035:             conversation_history=chat_history,
1036:             previous_iterations=list(research_results),
1037:             query_images=uploaded_images,
1038:             query_files=attached_file_context,
1039:             relevant_memories=relevant_memories,
1040:             user_name=user_name,
1041:             location=location,
1042:             send_status_func=partial(send_event, ChatEvent.STATUS),
1043:             cancellation_event=cancellation_event,
1044:             interrupt_queue=child_interrupt_queue,
1045:             abort_message=ChatEvent.END_EVENT.value,
1046:             agent=agent,
1047:             tracer=tracer,
1048:         ):
1049:             if isinstance(research_result, ResearchIteration):
1050:                 if research_result.summarizedResult:
1051:                     if research_result.onlineContext:
1052:                         online_results.update(research_result.onlineContext)
1053:                     if research_result.codeContext:
1054:                         code_results.update(research_result.codeContext)
1055:                     if research_result.context:
1056:                         compiled_references.extend(research_result.context)
1057:                 if not research_results or research_results[-1] is not research_result:
1058:                     research_results.append(research_result)
1059:             else:
1060:                 yield research_result
1061: 
1062:             # Track operator results across research and operator iterations
1063:             # This relies on two conditions:
1064:             # 1. Check to append new (partial) operator results
1065:             #    Relies on triggering this check on every status updates.
1066:             #    Status updates cascade up from operator to research to chat api on every step.
1067:             # 2. Keep operator results in sync with each research operator step
1068:             #    Relies on python object references to ensure operator results
1069:             #    are implicitly kept in sync after the initial append
1070:             if (
1071:                 research_results
1072:                 and research_results[-1].operatorContext
1073:                 and (not operator_results or operator_results[-1] is not research_results[-1].operatorContext)
1074:             ):
1075:                 operator_results.append(research_results[-1].operatorContext)
1076: 
1077:         # researched_results = await extract_relevant_info(q, researched_results, agent)
1078:         if state.verbose > 1:
1079:             logger.debug(f"Researched Results: {''.join(r.summarizedResult or '' for r in research_results)}")
1080: 
1081:     # Gather Context
1082:     ## Gather Document References
1083:     if ConversationCommand.Notes in conversation_commands:
1084:         try:
1085:             async for result in search_documents(
1086:                 q,
1087:                 (n or 7),
1088:                 d,
1089:                 user,
1090:                 chat_history,
1091:                 conversation_id,
1092:                 conversation_commands,
1093:                 location,
1094:                 partial(send_event, ChatEvent.STATUS),
1095:                 query_images=uploaded_images,
1096:                 query_files=attached_file_context,
1097:                 relevant_memories=relevant_memories,
1098:                 agent=agent,
1099:                 tracer=tracer,
1100:             ):
1101:                 if isinstance(result, dict) and ChatEvent.STATUS in result:
1102:                     yield result[ChatEvent.STATUS]
1103:                 else:
1104:                     compiled_references.extend(result[0])
1105:                     inferred_queries.extend(result[1])
1106:                     defiltered_query = result[2]
1107:         except Exception as e:
1108:             error_message = f"Error searching knowledge base: {e}. Attempting to respond without document references."
1109:             logger.error(error_message, exc_info=True)
1110:             async for result in send_event(
1111:                 ChatEvent.STATUS, "Document search failed. I'll try respond without document references"
1112:             ):
1113:                 yield result
1114: 
1115:         if not is_none_or_empty(compiled_references):
1116:             distinct_headings = set([d.get("compiled").split("\n")[0] for d in compiled_references if "compiled" in d])
1117:             distinct_files = set([d["file"] for d in compiled_references])
1118:             # Strip only leading # from headings
1119:             headings_str = "\n- " + "\n- ".join(distinct_headings).replace("#", "")
1120:             async for result in send_event(
1121:                 ChatEvent.STATUS,
1122:                 f"**Found {len(distinct_headings)} Notes Across {len(distinct_files)} Files**: {headings_str}",
1123:             ):
1124:                 yield result
1125: 
1126:         if conversation_commands == [ConversationCommand.Notes] and not await EntryAdapters.auser_has_entries(user):
1127:             async for result in send_llm_response(f"{no_entries_found.format()}", tracer.get("usage")):
1128:                 yield result
1129:             return
1130: 
1131:     if ConversationCommand.Notes in conversation_commands and is_none_or_empty(compiled_references):
1132:         conversation_commands.remove(ConversationCommand.Notes)
1133: 
1134:     ## Gather Online References
1135:     if ConversationCommand.Online in conversation_commands:
1136:         try:
1137:             async for result in search_online(
1138:                 defiltered_query,
1139:                 chat_history,
1140:                 location,
1141:                 user,
1142:                 partial(send_event, ChatEvent.STATUS),
1143:                 custom_filters=[],
1144:                 max_online_searches=3,
1145:                 query_images=uploaded_images,
1146:                 query_files=attached_file_context,
1147:                 relevant_memories=relevant_memories,
1148:                 agent=agent,
1149:                 tracer=tracer,
1150:             ):
1151:                 if isinstance(result, dict) and ChatEvent.STATUS in result:
1152:                     yield result[ChatEvent.STATUS]
1153:                 else:
1154:                     online_results = result
1155:         except Exception as e:
1156:             error_message = f"Error searching online: {e}. Attempting to respond without online results"
1157:             logger.warning(error_message)
1158:             async for result in send_event(
1159:                 ChatEvent.STATUS, "Online search failed. I'll try respond without online references"
1160:             ):
1161:                 yield result
1162: 
1163:     ## Gather Webpage References
1164:     if ConversationCommand.Webpage in conversation_commands:
1165:         try:
1166:             async for result in read_webpages(
1167:                 defiltered_query,
1168:                 chat_history,
1169:                 location,
1170:                 user,
1171:                 partial(send_event, ChatEvent.STATUS),
1172:                 max_webpages_to_read=1,
1173:                 query_images=uploaded_images,
1174:                 query_files=attached_file_context,
1175:                 relevant_memories=relevant_memories,
1176:                 agent=agent,
1177:                 tracer=tracer,
1178:             ):
1179:                 if isinstance(result, dict) and ChatEvent.STATUS in result:
1180:                     yield result[ChatEvent.STATUS]
1181:                 else:
1182:                     direct_web_pages = result
1183:             webpages = []
1184:             for query in direct_web_pages:
1185:                 if online_results.get(query):
1186:                     online_results[query]["webpages"] = direct_web_pages[query]["webpages"]
1187:                 else:
1188:                     online_results[query] = {"webpages": direct_web_pages[query]["webpages"]}
1189: 
1190:                 for webpage in direct_web_pages[query]["webpages"]:
1191:                     webpages.append(webpage["link"])
1192:             async for result in send_event(ChatEvent.STATUS, f"**Read web pages**: {webpages}"):
1193:                 yield result
1194:         except Exception as e:
1195:             logger.warning(
1196:                 f"Error reading webpages: {e}. Attempting to respond without webpage results",
1197:                 exc_info=True,
1198:             )
1199:             async for result in send_event(
1200:                 ChatEvent.STATUS, "Webpage read failed. I'll try respond without webpage references"
1201:             ):
1202:                 yield result
1203:

1208:             async for result in run_code(

1210:                 chat_history,
1211:                 context,
1212:                 location,
1213:                 user,
1214:                 partial(send_event, ChatEvent.STATUS),
1215:                 query_images=uploaded_images,
1216:                 query_files=attached_file_context,
1217:                 relevant_memories=relevant_memories,
1218:                 agent=agent,
1219:                 tracer=tracer,
1220:             ):
1221:                 if isinstance(result, dict) and ChatEvent.STATUS in result:
1222:                     yield result[ChatEvent.STATUS]
1223:                 else:
1224:                     code_results = result
1225:         except ValueError as e:
1226:             program_execution_context.append("Failed to run code")
1227:             logger.warning(
1228:                 f"Failed to use code tool: {e}. Attempting to respond without code results",
1229:                 exc_info=True,
1230:             )
1231: 
1232:     ## Operate Computer
1233:     if ConversationCommand.Operator in conversation_commands:
1234:         try:
1235:             async for result in operate_environment(
1236:                 defiltered_query,
1237:                 user,
1238:                 chat_history,
1239:                 location,
1240:                 list(operator_results)[-1] if operator_results else None,
1241:                 query_images=uploaded_images,
1242:                 query_files=attached_file_context,
1243:                 relevant_memories=relevant_memories,
1244:                 send_status_func=partial(send_event, ChatEvent.STATUS),
1245:                 agent=agent,
1246:                 cancellation_event=cancellation_event,
1247:                 interrupt_queue=child_interrupt_queue,
1248:                 tracer=tracer,
1249:             ):
1250:                 if isinstance(result, dict) and ChatEvent.STATUS in result:
1251:                     yield result[ChatEvent.STATUS]
1252:                 elif isinstance(result, OperatorRun):
1253:                     if not operator_results or operator_results[-1] is not result:
1254:                         operator_results.append(result)
1255:                     # Add webpages visited while operating browser to references
1256:                     if result.webpages:
1257:                         if not online_results.get(defiltered_query):

1262:                             online_results[defiltered_query]["webpages"] += result.webpages

1264:             program_execution_context.append(f"Browser operation error: {e}")
1265:             logger.warning(f"Failed to operate browser with {e}", exc_info=True)
1266:             async for result in send_event(

1268:             ):
1269:                 yield result
1270:
